webhook_queue_event_id.description: The identifier of the webhook queue event.

environment.description: The environment in which the queue event occurred.

webhook_id.description: The identifier of the webhook associated with this queue event.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the webhook queue event was created.

status.description: The current status of the webhook queue event.

subscription.description: The subscription event type for this webhook queue event.

url.description: The URL to which the webhook queue event will be sent via `POST`.

attempts_count.description: The number of attempts made to process this webhook queue event.

body.description: The payload body of the webhook queue event.

webhook_id.description: The unique ID of the webhook.

event.description: The event data - see [webhook subscriptions](ref:webhooks#available-subscriptions) for available event types.

verification_token.description: An optional verification token as provided during creating a webhook.

environment.description: The dataset used by the webhook. Either sandbox or production.

last_attempt_at.description: The timestamp of the last attempt to process this webhook queue event.

last_response_code.description: The HTTP response code from the last attempt to process this webhook queue event.

last_response_time_millis.description: The response time of the last attempt to send the webhook queue event to the URL in milliseconds.
